title: EclipseCraft v1
description: EclipseCraft is a modpack enriched with optimization improvements and exploration content. Perfect for both solo and multiplayer games, this modpack combines technical, magic, adventure, and survival elements to enhance your Minecraft experience.
body:
EclipseCraft Modpack - Push the Boundaries of Exploration and Adventure!
Introduction:
EclipseCraft is a modpack enriched with optimization improvements and exploration content. Perfect for both solo and multiplayer games, this modpack combines technical, magic, adventure, and survival elements to enhance your Minecraft experience.

Key Features:
Optimization: Enjoy a smoother gaming experience with Sodium and its plugins.
Exploration: Discover new places and structures with YUNG's Better Caves and Better Mineshafts.
Combat Mechanics: Experience dynamic combat and new weapons with Better Combat.
Highlights:
Exploration Focused: Numerous new areas and structures to explore.
Fun with Friends: Ideal for multiplayer fun.
Additional Settings:
Personalize your gaming experience with extra settings brought by the mods, including key bindings and language options.
